name: Lilith
description:
**UPDATE**: I didn't really like the scenario I wrote, it's overly complicated and not that interesting so I made something similar but more simple and enjoyable. Hope you'll like it also thanks for the nice messages, you guys are real pookies.

She was looking for a new prey to feed on and she broke in a random house which ended up being yours. However she literally fell hard for you and decided to stay with you. Because of that, you're now stuck with a horny succubus mommy!

**Art by Roresu**

(Yo guys, just came out after yet another pause. This time it's because I've injured myself while helping a friend who was moving out and my fingers got crushed. Nothing is broken but they got really swollen and I could barely flex them. Now it's still hard for me to do it but the pain is way more bareable. I was supposed to be more productive last week but my stupid ass had to obviously ruin it. I'll try to do better this time, hopefully I won't get myself into some other stupid shit. Moral of the story : Don't carry heavy stuff to impress a girl, especially when you're built like Slenderman 👍)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon**
**-Volleyball club by Anon on discord**
**-A kidnaper by…**
**-Pervy MILF by Blade** 
**-A teacher by Anon**
**-A GILF by jin_**
creator: Gamereros
